## Description

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 2

- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)

## Phase / Milestone

Specify the project phase or milestone this task belongs to (e.g., Phase 1 - Core Engine, Phase 2 - UI).

## Dependencies

List any tasks, issues, or external dependencies that must be completed before or alongside this task.

- None

## Implementation Notes

Add any technical notes, design considerations, architecture decisions, or references that are relevant to implementing this task.
